burst.msg_body: Sequential read of length 100352 has been inferred
burst.ParentFunc: mobilenetv2_block(ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const (*) [3][3], ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const (*) [32])

burst.msg_body: Could not widen since type i16 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
burst.ParentFunc: mobilenetv2_block(ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const (*) [3][3], ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const (*) [32])

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of length 100352 and bit width 16 in loop 'VITIS_LOOP_117_1' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
